description.content: Production-ready Pythagorean numerology API + hosted MCP for AI agents and developers. Connect Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code in seconds, no local setup. Calculate life path, expression, soul urge, personality, and maturity numbers. Pinnacle and Challenge life phase timing with meanings. Hidden Passion, Subconscious Self, and Cornerstone/Capstone name analysis. Birth day 1-31 profiles, lucky associations (colors, gemstones, planets), personal year and month forecasts, relationship compatibility, karmic debt and lessons. Unicode-aware multilingual name handling: Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Ukrainian, Belarusian, Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Arabic, Greek, and Hebrew names produce correct Pythagorean numbers via automatic transliteration so accented and non-Latin scripts no longer silently drop letters. 16 endpoints with detailed interpretations optimized for numerology apps, editorial platforms, AI chatbots, wellness platforms, and spiritual services.

item.name: Calculate Bridge Numbers - Harmonize different aspects of personality

request.name: Calculate Bridge Numbers - Harmonize different aspects of personality

description.content: Calculate three Bridge Numbers that reveal the adjustments needed to create harmony between different aspects of your numerology profile. Bridge Numbers are the absolute difference between pairs of core numbers: Life Path and Expression, Expression and Personality, Expression and Soul Urge. A Bridge of 0 means the two aspects are already aligned. Higher bridges (1 to 8) indicate greater tension and provide specific guidance on what changes to make. Bridge Numbers are essential for personal development, coaching applications, self-improvement platforms, and AI-powered personality analysis tools. Requires both a full birth name and birth date to calculate all four core numbers (Life Path, Expression, Soul Urge, Personality) internally before deriving the bridges.

description.content: Generate a comprehensive numerology chart combining all major calculations: Life Path, Expression, Soul Urge, Personality, Birth Day, Maturity, Karmic Lessons, Karmic Debt, and Personal Year. This single endpoint provides everything needed for a full numerology reading. Returns detailed interpretations for all numbers, karmic analysis, yearly forecast, and holistic summary. Perfect for numerology apps, complete reading services, birth chart generators, and comprehensive analysis tools. Save multiple API calls by getting the full chart in one request. Ideal for generating PDF reports or detailed user profiles.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

response.name: Successfully generated complete numerology chart

item.name: Get Number Meaning - Interpretation for any number 1-9, 11, 22, 33

request.name: Get Number Meaning - Interpretation for any number 1-9, 11, 22, 33

description.content: Get the complete meaning and interpretation for any numerology number (1-9, 11, 22, 33) using Pythagorean numerology. Returns comprehensive description including archetype title, keywords, personality traits, strengths, weaknesses, career guidance, relationship dynamics, and spiritual insights. Master numbers (11, 22, 33) include amplified meanings with their reduced base number. Perfect for numerology reference tools, educational apps, quick lookups, and building custom numerology calculators. Get detailed 300-500 word expert-written meanings for all 12 valid numerology numbers.

query.description: Response language (ISO 639-1). Supported: en, tr, de, es, hi, pt, fr, ru. Defaults to en. Languages without translations yet return English.

item.name: Get daily numerology number - Number of the Day with interpretation

request.name: Get daily numerology number - Number of the Day with interpretation

description.content: Receive a daily numerology number (1-9, 11, 22, 33) for guidance and reflection. Uses seeded randomness so the same seed gets the same number on the same date, perfect for "Number of the Day" features in numerology apps, wellness platforms, and daily guidance tools. Returns the number with full interpretation including archetype, keywords, strengths, challenges, career, relationships, and spiritual insights. Ideal for daily push notifications, morning briefings, and personalized numerology experiences.

Production-ready Pythagorean numerology API + hosted MCP for AI agents and developers. Connect Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code in seconds, no local setup. Calculate life path, expression, soul urge, personality, and maturity numbers. Pinnacle and Challenge life phase timing with meanings. Hidden Passion, Subconscious Self, and Cornerstone/Capstone name analysis. Birth day 1-31 profiles, lucky associations (colors, gemstones, planets), personal year and month forecasts, relationship compatibility, karmic debt and lessons. Unicode-aware multilingual name handling: Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Ukrainian, Belarusian, Hindi, Bengali, Tamil, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Arabic, Greek, and Hebrew names produce correct Pythagorean numbers via automatic transliteration so accented and non-Latin scripts no longer silently drop letters. 16 endpoints with detailed interpretations optimized for numerology apps, editorial platforms, AI chatbots, wellness platforms, and spiritual services.

# RoxyAPI: AI-Native Insight Infrastructure

> **Base URL:** `https://roxyapi.com/api/v2`
> All endpoint paths below are relative to this base URL.

The only multi-domain spiritual intelligence API. 12 domains (astrology, Vedic astrology, human design, forecast, biorhythm, tarot, numerology, crystals, dreams, I-Ching, angel numbers, location), 148+ endpoints, one API key, instant activation. Remote MCP server per domain plus AGENTS.md for AI coding agents.

## Who uses RoxyAPI

- **Developers** building astrology apps, tarot platforms, numerology calculators, or dream journals
- **AI agent builders** connecting Claude, GPT, or Gemini to real calculation engines via MCP
- **Vibe coders** shipping insight apps with Cursor, Bolt, or Replit using zero domain knowledge
- **Founders and brands** launching branded spiritual experiences for their audience

## Quick start (60 seconds)

**1. Get your API key** at [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing). Instant delivery, no account required.

**2. Make your first call:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/tarot/draw -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"count": 3}'
```

**3. Monitor usage:**
```bash
curl -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY" https://roxyapi.com/api/v2/usage
```

## AI agent integration (MCP)

RoxyAPI has native Model Context Protocol support. Your AI agent auto-discovers all 148+ endpoints as callable tools with zero configuration:
- **Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf**: Add MCP server URL in settings
- **OpenAI Agents, Gemini ADK**: Connect via Streamable HTTP transport
- **Custom agents**: Use the MCP Python/TypeScript SDK

MCP endpoints: `https://roxyapi.com/mcp/{domain}` (e.g., `/mcp/astrology`, `/mcp/tarot`)

Setup guide: [roxyapi.com/docs/mcp](https://roxyapi.com/docs/mcp)

## Authentication

All endpoints require an API key via header or query param:
- **Header (recommended):** `X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY`
- **Query param (testing):** `?api_key=YOUR_KEY`

## Response format

Clean JSON, no wrapper objects. Errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`. The `error` field is human-readable (may change wording). The `code` field is machine-readable (stable — safe to switch on programmatically).

Rate limit headers on every response: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `X-RateLimit-Used`

## Errors

All errors return `{ "error": "message", "code": "error_code" }`:

| Status | Code | When |
|--------|------|------|
| 400 | `validation_error` | Missing or invalid parameters. Response includes `issues[]` with per-field `path`, `message`, `code`, `expected`, `minimum`, `maximum`, `format`, `pattern`. |
| 401 | `api_key_required` | No API key provided |
| 401 | `invalid_api_key` | Key format invalid or tampered |
| 401 | `subscription_not_found` | Key references non-existent subscription |
| 401 | `subscription_inactive` | Subscription cancelled, expired, or suspended |
| 404 | `not_found` | Resource not found. Response may include a ranked `suggestions[]` array (each with `endpoint`, `hint`, and a `docs` deep link) for typo recovery. |
| 405 | `method_not_allowed` | Path exists for a different HTTP method. Response includes `allow[]` and the `Allow` header lists valid methods. |
| 429 | `rate_limit_exceeded` | Monthly quota reached |
| 500 | `internal_error` | Server error |

## Pricing

Flat per-request pricing. Every call counts the same, whether a planet position or a full birth chart with aspects. No credit systems, no variable costs. Plans from $39 to $699/month.

See [roxyapi.com/pricing](https://roxyapi.com/pricing)
